design_plan: rng(seed=42)->hero_variant=cinematic_centered; AIDA: attention(hero), interest(compare), desire(cache economics), action(CTA). hero_math: H1 max 1120px => 2–3 lines. bento_density: grid-auto-flow:dense present. label_sweep: competitors mentioned. button_contrast: black/white pills verified.
headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: A fair, source-backed comparison of Super and Google Gemini for people choosing a personal AI agent. Gemini leads with native computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash (public preview). Super is purpose-built for repeated computer-use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache that compounds value over time.
